data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding service and provider restrictions.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Service and provider restrictions', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence or functionality of these restrictions. The linked use case mentions the need for service and provider restrictions but lacks the necessary details to assert their implementation, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of service and provider restrictions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
